name: ltx-video
description: LTX-Video is the first DiT-based video generation model capable of generating high-quality videos in real-time. It produces 24 FPS videos at a 768x512 resolution faster than they can be watched.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the output video. Ignored if an image is provided.
aspect_ratio.title: aspect_ratio

cfg.description: How strongly the video follows the prompt
cfg.title: Cfg

image.description: Optional input image to use as the starting frame
image.title: Image

image_noise_scale.description: Lower numbers stick more closely to the input image
image_noise_scale.title: Image Noise Scale

length.description: Length of the output video in frames
length.title: length

negative_prompt.default: low quality, worst quality, deformed, distorted
negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want to see in your video
negative_prompt.title: Negative Prompt

prompt.default: best quality, 4k, HDR, a tracking shot of a beautiful scene
prompt.description: Text prompt for the video. This model needs long descriptive prompts, if the prompt is too short the quality won't be good.
prompt.title: Prompt

seed.description: Set a seed for reproducibility. Random by default.
seed.title: Seed

target_size.description: Target size for the output video
target_size.title: target_size
